misc.text: No offense to her she did an amazing job, but please change the VA for Teen Boruto please. #BORUTO VIZ Media (@VIZMedia) In celebration of Boruto's Birthday today, let's look back when he got crafty with his Rasengan 🌀 🗣️ Shoutout to VA @BennettAbara Video — https://nitter.net/VIZMedia/status/2037583324441346068#m
